user_pain: User has a blank screen when trying to make a Pix transaction.
proposed_action: Investigate unhandled exceptions in the Pix confirmation flow and implement an Error Boundary to prevent empty screen states.

user_pain: The app crashes unexpectedly when validating non-existent dates in 30-day months.
proposed_action: Fix the Date object manipulation logic in the scheduling feature and add 'max days' validation per month in the date picker.

user_pain: Difficulty in finding receipts, requiring excessive clicks from the user.
proposed_action: Optimize the information architecture of the statement screen and add a direct shortcut to 'Recent Receipts' on the home screen.
